reference: I was just diagnosed with a broken bone located underneath the ball of my foot. The attending physician suggested taking Aleve and wearing shoes with stiff bottoms. Are there any other precautions I need to take to aid in its healing? The doctor also indicated that it was okay to resume aerobics, provided the foot didn't cause pain and I wore a supportive shoe. Is he correct?
text: I just dumped my portfolio, made a complete withdrawal on my stocks.
